prompt: Part 4 generation started with config: {"difficulty":"hard","count":5,"speechType":null,"industry":null}

あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format shown below. Do not include any other text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

応答は以下の形式のJSONで返してください:
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "適切な話者名（例: Announcer, Manager, Guide）",
      "role": "話者の役割（例: Company spokesperson, Event coordinator）",
      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "main_purpose/detail/inference/next_action/intended_audience"
    },
    // 同様に合計3問
  ]
}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Airport or flight announcement (空港・飛行機内の案内)
【Industry】: Design and Creative (デザイン・クリエイティブ)
【Difficulty】: hard
【Question Types】: detail, next_action, inference
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=A, Question 2=A, Question 3=A

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Flight Attendant",
      "role": "Cabin crew member",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Ladies and gentlemen, welcome aboard Skyway Airlines flight 302 with service to New York City. As you settle into your seats, I'd like to draw your attention to our in-flight entertainment options, specifically curated for the creative minds on board. We are thrilled to offer a special feature on influential graphic designers that has been recently added to our digital library. Furthermore, for those interested in exploring more about spatial design, we have a selection of award-winning documentaries available. I'd like to remind all passengers that refreshments will be served shortly after takeoff. For your convenience, please note that electronic devices should remain in airplane mode throughout the flight.",
    "topic": "In-flight announcement highlighting entertainment options related to design"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What is specially featured in the in-flight entertainment options?",
      "options": [
        "Influential graphic designers",
        "Top culinary chefs",
        "Popular travel destinations",
        "Historical documentaries"
      ],
      "correct": "Influential graphic designers",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "スピーチではグラフィックデザイナーを特集したコンテンツが含まれていると述べられていました。",
      "questionType": "detail"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What will happen shortly after takeoff?",
      "options": [
        "Refreshments will be served",
        "Passengers can use their phones",
        "Seatbelt sign will turn off",
        "A movie screening will start"
      ],
      "correct": "Refreshments will be served",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "離陸後すぐに飲み物が提供されると案内されました。",
      "questionType": "next_action"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What can be inferred about the intended audience of the entertainment options?",
      "options": [
        "They have an interest in design and creativity",
        "They are frequent international travelers",
        "They prefer watching movies over reading",
        "They enjoy physical activities during the flight"
      ],
      "correct": "They have an interest in design and creativity",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "デザインやクリエイティブに関する特集が組まれていることから、そういった分野に興味のある人々が対象であると推測できます。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    }
  ]
}
```

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: flight_announcement
Industry: design_creative
Speaker Role: Cabin crew member
Topic: In-flight announcement highlighting entertainment options related to design

Speech Text:
Ladies and gentlemen, welcome aboard Skyway Airlines flight 302 with service to New York City. As you settle into your seats, I'd like to draw your attention to our in-flight entertainment options, specifically curated for the creative minds on board. We are thrilled to offer a special feature on influential graphic designers that has been recently added to our digital library. Furthermore, for those interested in exploring more about spatial design, we have a selection of award-winning documentaries available. I'd like to remind all passengers that refreshments will be served shortly after takeoff. For your convenience, please note that electronic devices should remain in airplane mode throughout the flight.

}

【Speech Type】: Sales pitch or promotion (販売促進・セールス案内)
【Industry】: Design and Creative (デザイン・クリエイティブ)
【Difficulty】: hard
【Question Types】: next_action, intended_audience, detail
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=D, Question 2=A, Question 3=C

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Sophia",
      "role": "Creative Director",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Good afternoon, everyone. I'm excited to introduce you to our latest innovation at StudioCraft, the Imaginarium Design Suite. This comprehensive package uses cutting-edge AI technology to streamline your design process, allowing you to focus on creativity rather than repetitive tasks. By integrating seamlessly with existing software, the Imaginarium Suite accelerates workflow and enhances collaborative possibilities. We are offering a complimentary two-week trial exclusively for early adopters. To get started, visit our website and sign up using the code VISION. This offer is valid only until the end of the month. Embrace the future of design with Imaginarium and unleash your creative potential.",
    "topic": "Promotion of the Imaginarium Design Suite"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What should interested customers do next to take advantage of the offer?",
      "options": [
        "Purchase the Imaginarium Design Suite directly.",
        "Attend a workshop on using design software.",
        "Contact StudioCraft customer service.",
        "Visit the website and sign up using the code."
      ],
      "correct": "Visit the website and sign up using the code.",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "次の行動として、ウェブサイトを訪れてコードを使って登録するように案内されています。",
      "questionType": "next_action"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "Who is the intended audience for this speech?",
      "options": [
        "Design professionals interested in innovative tools.",
        "General consumers looking for tech gadgets.",
        "Students studying graphic design techniques.",
        "Investors evaluating new market products."
      ],
      "correct": "Design professionals interested in innovative tools.",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "スピーチはデザインプロセスを効率化し、クリエイティブのポテンシャルを引き出すことに興味を持つデザインの専門家に向けられています。",
      "questionType": "intended_audience"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What feature of the Imaginarium Design Suite is highlighted as enhancing workflow?",
      "options": [
        "Its user-friendly interface.",
        "Its cost-effectiveness.",
        "Seamless integration with existing software.",
        "Low power consumption."
      ],
      "correct": "Seamless integration with existing software.",
      "correctPosition": "C",
      "explanation": "ワークフローを向上させるために、既存のソフトウェアとシームレスに統合できることが強調されています。",
      "questionType": "detail"
    }
  ]
}

This comprehensive package uses cutting-edge AI technology to streamline your design process, allowing you to focus on creativity rather than repetitive tasks. By integrating seamlessly with existing software, the Imaginarium Suite accelerates workflow and enhances collaborative possibilities. We are offering a complimentary two-week trial exclusively for early adopters. To get started, visit our website and sign up using the code VISION. あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

      "role": "話者の役割（例: Company spokesperson, Event coordinator）",
      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",

【Speech Type】: Tour or facility guide (施設や観光地のガイド)
【Industry】: Legal Services (法律サービス)
【Difficulty】: hard
【Question Types】: detail, detail, inference
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=A, Question 2=D, Question 3=B

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Guide",
      "role": "Legal services facility guide",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Welcome to our legal services headquarters. Our first stop is the main conference room, where our legal teams conduct strategic meetings. Notice the advanced video conferencing equipment, which enables seamless collaboration with clients worldwide. Next, on your left, is the legal research division. This is where our team analyzes case law and prepares documentation pivotal for trials. Further down the corridor, you'll see our library, containing a comprehensive collection of legal texts and journals, valued for its depth and historical annotations. Lastly, we have the client reception area, a harmonious space designed to provide comfort while clients await their consultations.",
    "topic": "Legal services facility tour"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What is the purpose of the advanced video conferencing equipment mentioned?",
      "options": [
        "To enable seamless collaboration with clients worldwide.",
        "To entertain guests with legal documentaries.",
        "To store legal research materials digitally.",
        "To provide training for new employees."
      ],
      "correct": "To enable seamless collaboration with clients worldwide.",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "スピーチで、設備はクライアントとのシームレスな共同作業を可能にすると述べています。",
      "questionType": "detail"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What is unique about the library in the facility?",
      "options": [
        "It includes a digital database of all case laws.",
        "It is open to the public for legal research.",
        "It provides real-time updates on court rulings.",
        "It has a collection valued for its depth and historical annotations."
      ],
      "correct": "It has a collection valued for its depth and historical annotations.",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "スピーチは、ライブラリが、深さと歴史的注釈のために評価されている本のコレクションを持っていることを強調しています。",
      "questionType": "detail"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "Why might the design of the client reception area be significant?",
      "options": [
        "To improve overall facility security.",
        "To provide comfort while clients await consultations.",
        "To impress visiting legal experts.",
        "To accommodate large group meetings."
      ],
      "correct": "To provide comfort while clients await consultations.",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "スピーチは、受付エリアが快適さを提供することを目的にデザインされていると述べています。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    }
  ]
}
```
